prompts: A large orange tabby cat with a torn left ear and bright amber eyes sits on a sun-warmed stone wall in a Mediterranean village, then jumps down and walks away along the cobblestone street, getting farther and farther until it disappears around a corner and is completely out of sight. White-washed houses with blue doors behind. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A sun-warmed stone wall in a Mediterranean village, completely empty. White-washed houses with blue doors, potted red geraniums, a lazy lizard on the wall, and villagers walking past in the distance. No cat anywhere. The camera lingers on the quiet scene. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

The same large orange tabby cat with a torn left ear and bright amber eyes reappears from around the corner, walks back along the cobblestone street, and jumps onto the sun-warmed stone wall, settling into a seated position facing the camera. It is the same cat that walked away earlier. White-washed houses with blue doors behind. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A vintage red double-decker bus crosses Tower Bridge in London on a rainy day, then drives off the far end of the bridge and disappears completely out of sight into the London streets. Black taxis, pedestrians with umbrellas, and the Thames below. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

Tower Bridge in London on a rainy day with no red bus visible anywhere. Black taxis cross the bridge, pedestrians walk with umbrellas, the Thames flows below with a barge passing underneath. The camera lingers on the bridge without the bus. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

The same vintage red double-decker bus reappears from the opposite end of Tower Bridge, crossing back across the bridge on the rainy day. It is the same bus that drove away earlier. Black taxis, pedestrians with umbrellas, the Thames below. Grey overcast sky. Wide shot.

A bright yellow hot air balloon with a wicker basket floats in a clear blue sky above rolling green hills dotted with sheep, then drifts slowly away toward the horizon, getting smaller and smaller until it disappears completely out of sight. Soft morning light, wide shot.

A clear blue sky above rolling green hills dotted with sheep. No balloon visible anywhere, just wispy clouds, birds soaring, and the peaceful countryside below. The camera lingers on the empty sky. Soft morning light, wide shot.

The same bright yellow hot air balloon with a wicker basket drifts back into view from the opposite direction, floating above the rolling green hills dotted with sheep, growing larger as it approaches. It is the same balloon that drifted away earlier. Clear blue sky, soft morning light, wide shot.

A red cardinal bird with bright red plumage perches on a snow-covered pine branch in a winter forest, then spreads its wings and flies away from the branch, getting smaller and smaller until it disappears completely out of sight into the forest. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.

A snow-covered pine branch in a winter forest, completely empty. Snowflakes drift gently down, other bare branches visible in the background, and a light dusting of fresh snow settles on the needles. No bird anywhere. The camera lingers on the empty branch. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.

The same red cardinal bird with bright red plumage flies back into view and lands on the snow-covered pine branch, ruffling its feathers and facing the camera. It is the same cardinal that flew away earlier. Snow-covered needles and the winter forest in the background. Soft diffused winter light, close-up shot.

A wooden sailboat with white sails and a dark blue hull glides across a calm turquoise bay, then sails toward the rocky cliff on the right side, getting smaller until it disappears completely behind the cliff and is out of sight. Rocky cliffs with green vegetation on both sides. Golden sunset light, wide shot.

A calm turquoise bay between rocky cliffs with green vegetation. The water surface is smooth with gentle ripples, a few seagulls skim the water, and the sunset paints the cliffs orange. No boat visible anywhere. The camera lingers on the empty bay. Golden sunset light, wide shot.

The same wooden sailboat with white sails and a dark blue hull reappears from behind the left rocky cliff, sailing back into the turquoise bay toward the center of the frame. It is the same sailboat that sailed away earlier. Rocky cliffs with golden sunset light, wide shot.

A shiny red vintage sports car with gleaming chrome details is parked in front of a Parisian cafe with green awnings on a cobblestone street, then starts its engine, pulls away from the curb, and drives down the street until it disappears completely out of sight around a corner. Passers-by on the sidewalk. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

A cobblestone street in front of a Parisian cafe with green awnings. The parking spot in front is completely empty. Passers-by walk on the sidewalk, a waiter sets tables outside, and pigeons gather near breadcrumbs. No car anywhere. The camera lingers on the empty street. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.

The same shiny red vintage sports car with gleaming chrome details drives back into view from around the corner and pulls into the parking spot in front of the Parisian cafe with green awnings. It is the same car that drove away earlier. Chrome details gleam. Passers-by on the sidewalk. Warm afternoon light, medium shot.
